task_completion.description: A repair order is created for the correct customer and product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo Repair Order screen showing Customer 'Constructors Inc' and Product 'Industrial Power Drill'.

task_completion.description: The required part is added to the repair order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'High-Capacity Battery' is listed under the Parts tab of the repair order.

task_completion.description: The required labor service is added to the repair order with the correct quantity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Repair Labor' is listed under the Operations or Labor tab with a quantity of 2.0 (hours).

task_completion.description: The repair order is marked as completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status indicator of the repair order in Odoo shows as 'Done' or 'Completed'.

task_completion.description: An invoice is generated for the repair and validated (posted).
task_completion.visual_evidence: An Odoo Customer Invoice screen showing the status as 'Posted', containing both the 'High-Capacity Battery' and 'Repair Labor' in the invoice lines.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface to process the repair order.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web application in a browser, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The invoice was generated through the Odoo workflow.
integrity.visual_evidence: The invoice screen is the standard Odoo accounting/invoicing interface linked to the repair order, not a text document or mocked-up page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify the database or bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows executing SQL commands, python scripts, or XML-RPC calls to update the repair order or invoice states.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Customer Name: Constructors Inc. Product Name: Industrial Power Drill. Part to add: High-Capacity Battery. Service to add: Repair Labor (Quantity: 2.0 hours). Expected final repair state: 'done'. Expected final invoice state: 'posted' (validated).
